creator: gerrit.kuehn@aei.mpg.de
text:
I have been running tincd from tinc-devel without much issues in the past. However, after upgrading to FreeBSD 12.3, I see frequent crashes like this:

kernel: pid 72793 (tincd), jid 0, uid 0: exited on signal 6 (core dumped)

I have been using tinc-devel (1.1pre18) since January, which worked fine. Looks like it only started crashing after updating FreeBSD to 12.3. Updating tinc to 1.1pre18_1 did not help, it still crashes after some hours of use.
Is anyone else seeing this? Any idea how to debug further?
